description: Fix review issues: incorrect variance formula in BehaviorAnalyticsEngine, regex compiled per call in NLPProcessor, global mutex in AIEngine, unbounded concatenation in summarizeLog
steps: Fix BehaviorAnalyticsEngine::updateBaseline to use proper Welford's algorithm with M2 tracking (store m2 in UserBaseline struct)
Pre-compile regex patterns in NLPProcessor at construction time and cap input size in summarizeLog
Replace global mutex in AIEngine with no lock (subsystems are stateless or have their own locks)
Add TODO comments for issues 5-7 (keyword-based risk factors, no concurrency tests, keyword parsing gap)
acceptance_criteria: BehaviorAnalyticsEngine::updateBaseline produces correct variance using Welford's online algorithm
NLPProcessor regex patterns are compiled once at construction, not per call
NLPProcessor::summarizeLog caps input size to avoid unbounded memory usage
AIEngine does not serialize independent operations behind a single mutex
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/ThreatOne && cmake -B build -DENABLE_QT=OFF && cmake --build build && cd build && ctest --output-on-failure
